greetings: Hello there! How can I help you today?
Hey! What brings you here today?
how_are_you: I'm just a bunch of rules, but I'm functioning perfectly! 😄
Running on pure logic and doing great! Thanks for asking!
All systems operational! How about you?
name_question: They call me DecodeBot - here to help with my if-else brain!
I'm DecodeBot, version 1.0. No deep learning here, just pure logic!
help: I can greet you, tell you my name, answer simple questions, and respond to thanks.
Try saying: 'hello', 'how are you', 'what is your name', or 'thanks'
Commands I understand: greetings, how are you, name, help, thank you, bye
weather: I don't have access to weather data yet. I'm just a rule-based bot!
Weather checking requires API integration. For now, look outside! 🌤️
time: I can't tell time yet. My world runs on if-else statements!
Time? All I know is it's always bot o'clock! ⏰
funny: Why did the programmer quit his job? Because he didn't get arrays! 😂
What's a computer's favorite beat? An algorithm! 🎵
default: I'm not sure how to respond to that yet. Try saying 'hello' or 'help'.
